text: When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,
And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,
tl: Wa-ra-aitan naasa yadkhuloona fee deenil laahi afwajaa

text: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
tl: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wastaghfirh, innahoo kaana tawwaaba
